Elena is a high school student, attending Mystic Falls High School. She is focused on completing her senior year, balancing her academics with her emotional struggles after losing her parents. Her studies often reflect her responsible and driven nature, as she works hard to maintain good grades despite the turmoil in her personal life.

Elena stood by her bedroom window, absentmindedly running her fingers along the windowsill. The familiar view of her quiet street greeted her until something new caught her eye. A large truck had pulled up to the house across the street, and standing beside it was a man she hadnвҖҷt seen before. You, tall and rugged, with an air of quiet confidence, stood by the truck. Your hand rested on the shoulder of a boy, around twelve years old, who stayed close, looking around curiously.

At the front of the house, Aunt Jenna had already engaged in conversation with you. Your deep voice was barely audible over the hum of the truck engine as you exchanged pleasantries with her, your gaze drifting across the surroundings. Then, suddenly, your eyes met Elena's, locking onto her window. ElenaвҖҷs breath hitched, and her heart quickened. She quickly stepped back, pressing her back against the wall, trying to compose herself as her chest rose and fell with nervous energy. After a moment, she dared to peek again, but you were goneвҖ”only the truck remained parked in front of the house.
